description: Lock the 2026-06-24 rescope of pneumatic_tire_mass_production to source-backed 1890 commercial pneumatic tire production for bicycles.

checks.reason: Britannica anchors Dunlop tire commercial production to 1890, not the previous 1913 automobile-mass-production decade.
The corrected scope is pneumatic rubber tire production, and the source-backed material basis is durable vulcanized rubber.
Bicycle and tricycle use supplied the early commercial application context for Dunlop's tire.
The source-backed scope should not require the narrower safety-bicycle package, whose description already includes pneumatic tires.
The corrected 1890 tire-production milestone predates 1913 automobile mass production.
